message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. Please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I already told you I can’t pay right now, and I’m not confirming anything until I know my options.
Understood. You’ve said you can’t pay right now and you do not want to complete verification in this chat until you know your options. I’m stopping the assessment here and passing that forward.

I’m unemployed right now, so I’m not making any payment promises.

Understood. You’ve stated unemployment, so I’m recording this as hardship. For this Nira account, the available paths are a reduced-closure review or a payment-plan review, and any plan would need to complete within 30 days under current policy. Since you are not making any payment promises, I’m not asking for a commitment. Also, your account shows a stop-contact restriction, so I will flag this for hardship handling and no further outreach in this channel.
